code:
import io
import string

let opt = io.read_line()
let line = match opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut have_prev = false
mut prev = 0
mut sorted = true
mut in_num = false
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1

while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      32
    end
  else
    32
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if in_num
      let val = cur * sign
      if have_prev
        if val < prev
          sorted = false
        end
      end
      prev = val
      have_prev = true
      in_num = false
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
    end
  else if b == 45
    if not in_num
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
    end
  else if b == 43
    if not in_num
      in_num = true
    end
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if sorted
  println("YES")
else
  println("NO")
end
